events.new: TEST_CASE("Optional comparison ops", "[optional][approvals]") { using Catch::Optional; Optional<int> a, b; SECTION( "Empty optionals are equal" ) { REQUIRE( a == b ); REQUIRE_FALSE( a != b ); } SECTION( "Empty and non-empty optionals are never equal" ) { a = 1; REQUIRE_FALSE( a == b ); REQUIRE( a != b ); } SECTION( "non-empty optionals are equal if the contained elements are equal") { a = 1; b = 2; REQUIRE( a != b ); REQUIRE_FALSE( a == b ); a = 2; REQUIRE( a == b ); REQUIRE_FALSE( a != b ); } }
